Package appDomain

Contains Main AppDomain.

See: Description

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Tag
    Tag represents a single XML tag occurrence found while scanning a document.
    XMLParser
    XMLParser reads an XML document supplied via the command line and checks whether it is syntactically well-formed according to the rules defined in the assignment specification (matching start/end tags, no intercrossing of nested tags, ignored attributes, ignored self-closing tags and processing instructions, and a single root tag).
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    Tag.Type
    Enumerates the two kinds of tags this parser deals with.

Package appDomain Description

Contains Main AppDomain.
